sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 47:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 47:1
items.html: Because the lights preceded the vessels (See answer 13), and the reflected light that ascends from below upward and clothes them is not regarded as actual vessels, but as roots of vessels, and we do not have attainment in the light without a vessel (See answer 21).
